steps.title: Use the accuracy clue
steps.content: The dash explains why the displays are notable: museum staff consulted numerous sources to ensure accuracy. The blank needs a noun for careful, thorough, disciplined research.

steps.title: Reject opposite meanings
steps.content: B means obscurity, but the passage is not about the research being unknown or unclear. C means shallowness, the opposite of consulting many sources. D means newness, which the passage never emphasizes. The word must describe careful research behind accurate displays. The answer is A.
